title: Freedom of information | NICE
text:
happy with our response, you can request an internal review of how we handled your request. To do this, you need to write to us within 40 working days of our response. Send your request to:
Associate Director, Corporate Office
NICE
2nd Floor
2 Redman Place
London
E20 1JQ
Or email:  complaints@nice.org.uk .
If you are unhappy with the outcome of the internal review you can request a review by the  Information Commissioner .
